heroHeadline: Built on Experience. Delivered with Precision.
heroSubheading: Specialist groundworks and construction across Sevenoaks, Tonbridge, and the surrounding Kent area.
aboutText: Every project we deliver is a reflection of our character, and our track record speaks for itself. We take pride in maintaining a clean, organised site throughout, treating every property with the same respect we'd expect in our own. We only specify and supply top-tier materials, because quality is never a compromise. Our work is carried out by a respectful, hardworking team who are committed to getting it right, and everything we do is fully guaranteed. Customer satisfaction isn't just a goal, it's the standard we hold ourselves to on every job.
servicesSubtitle: From concrete foundations to full garden renovations, every job delivered to the highest standard.
service1Desc: Closeboard, panel and post fencing installed to a high finish. Long-lasting and built properly from the ground up.
service2Desc: Indian sandstone, porcelain, block paving and more. Driveways, patios and pathways laid with precision.
service3Desc: Foundations for sheds, greenhouses, extensions and new builds. Done right from the ground up.
service4Desc: Ground preparation, levelling and fresh turf laid to give you a clean, even lawn ready to enjoy.
service5Desc: Structural retaining walls built to last. Designed properly and finished cleanly to hold and enhance your space.
service6Desc: Garden paths and pedestrian walkways laid in a range of materials to suit the style of your property.
service7Desc: External steps built in stone, block or concrete. Safe, solid and finished to complement the surrounding landscape.
service8Desc: Surface drainage, channel drainage and soakaways installed to keep water away from your home and garden.
gallerySubtitle: Real projects, real results. Across paving, foundations, fencing and more.
galleryLabel2: Autumn Blend Indian Sandstone paving walkway installed.
galleryLabel3: Fence panel installation with concrete base
googleReview1Text: "Ryan came when he said he would, did a neat and tidy job replacing broken fencing and post and repaired some brickwork and cleared away the site on completion of the work. Can't be faulted for what he did."
googleReview2Text: "Brilliant 5 star work from Ryan, super pleased with the results and his attention to detail is second to none."
googleReview3Text: "Ryan replaced the path around our house and dug a trench for an electricity cable to connect to our garage. The work was done to a high standard and in line with the original quote. The site was left clean and tidy and he was very easy to communicate with throughout. A very polite and friendly person to have around."
checkatradeReview1Text: "I had my exterior render painted including the wooden soffits, repairing cracks and painting the tiled sills. The job required full scaffold and was completed on time to an exceptional quality. Ryan went above and beyond: even re-painted my down pipes with no extra charge. I recommend Real Developments Ltd and they are my first call for future jobs."
checkatradeReview1Author: Full exterior painting & drive work · TN14
checkatradeReview2Text: "Ryan did an amazing job for us in building our garden patio. The work was done to a very high standard and he was always tidy and courteous."
checkatradeReview3Text: "Ryan did a great job, understood exactly what was required, didn't try to make it more complicated than necessary and completed the work efficiently and with minimal disruption. The finished job looks good and the site was left tidy."
coverageSubtitle: Based in Sevenoaks, we serve clients across Kent and the surrounding area.
ctaText: No obligation. No hidden costs. Just honest, expert advice from people who know their trade.
